bullets: 𝐖𝐇𝐘 𝐂𝐇𝐎𝐎𝐒𝐄 𝐀𝐇𝐀𝐌 𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐅𝐈𝐃𝐄 𝐀𝐈𝐑 𝐏𝐔𝐑𝐈𝐅𝐈𝐄𝐑𝐒: AHAM (Association of Home Appliance Manufacturers) is an ANSI-accredited organization that sets strict standards for appliance performance. Air purifiers with the AHAM VERIFIDE seal have been independently tested for air cleaning performance, safety, and energy efficiency. When you choose an AHAM certified air purifier, you're choosing a product trusted for reliable and effective indoor air quality improvement.

𝐀𝐇𝐀𝐌 𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐅𝐈𝐃𝐄 & 𝐓𝐑𝐔𝐒𝐓𝐄𝐃 𝐁𝐘 𝐄𝐗𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐓𝐒: Certified by the Association of Home Appliance Manufacturers (AHAM), the Core 400S-P has been independently tested for performance, efficiency, and safety. Verified CADR ratings: Smoke: 231 CFM Dust: 240 CFM Pollen: 259 CFM

𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇-𝐄𝐅𝐅𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐂𝐘 𝐀𝐈𝐑 𝐏𝐔𝐑𝐈𝐅𝐈𝐂𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐋𝐀𝐑𝐆𝐄 𝐑𝐎𝐎𝐌𝐒: The LEVOIT Core 400S-P Air Purifier is designed for powerful whole-room purification. With a smoke CADR of 231 CFM, it can clean air in spaces up to 1,733 sq ft in just one hour—perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, and open floor plans.

𝟑-𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐆𝐄 𝐇𝐈𝐆𝐇 𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄 𝐅𝐈𝐋𝐓𝐑𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: 3-in-1 filter has a strong filtration performance of ultra fine particles. 99.97 percent filtration efficiency for 0.1-0.3 μm airborne particulates, including pollen, dust, and animal dander. Disclaimer: Tested by an independent lab.

𝐁𝐄𝐃𝐑𝐎𝐎𝐌 𝐅𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐇𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒 𝐎𝐍 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐏𝐋𝐀𝐘: Don't worry about dust and pollen when you stay in the bedroom where bedding, furniture and potted plants are. Thanks to the AirSight Plus technology, the laser dust sensor scans the surrounding air for airborne particles, continuously updating the PM2.5 display.

script.title: Transform Your Air Quality Instantly!
script.narration: Does pet dander and dust drive you crazy? Meet the LEVOIT Core 400S-P! With 99.97% filtration efficiency, it cleans large rooms up to 1,733 sq ft in just an hour! Breathe easy and enjoy fresh air effortlessly. Link is in the first comment!

title: ASUS ROG Azoth Extreme Wireless Mechanical Gaming Keyboard – 75% TKL, ROG NX Snow Linear Switches, PBT Keycaps, Aluminum Chassis, Carbon Fiber, Gasket Mount, Color OLED Screen, PC/Mac Support - Black
selection_reasoning: The ASUS ROG Azoth Extreme Wireless Mechanical Gaming Keyboard has a high price of $399.99, which offers significant profit potential despite not having a rating or BSR available. It is a premium product likely to attract serious gamers.

bsr.category: PC Gaming Keyboards Warranty & Support Amazon

bullets: Tri-Mode Connectivity: Connect via 2.4 GHz RF wireless with ROG SpeedNova, Bluetooth (up to 3 devices), and wired USB-C mode. Enjoy ultra-low-latency and up to 1600 hours of battery life with RGB and OLED off, ideal for gaming and everyday productivity

Premium Aluminum Build & 75% Layout: Durable and refined design crafted from a solid aluminum-alloy chassis and metal frame with 12-step CNC process. Compact 75 percent layout saves space while maintaining full functionality for gaming and productivity

Speed Tap Mode for Competitive Gaming: Speed Tap Mode enables instant directional changes in FPS and esports titles, eliminating input delays for precise aim and fluid counter-strafing. Perfect for players who demand maximum responsiveness

ROG Polling Rate Booster & Omni Receiver: Achieve 8K Hz polling rate in both wired and wireless modes with the ROG Polling Rate Booster. Pair keyboard and mouse simultaneously via the ROG Omni Receiver for a cleaner, more efficient setup

Carbon-Fiber Plate & Three-Layer Dampening: Carbon-fiber positioning plate offers crisp yet controlled keystrokes. Dual PORON foams and a silicone pad absorb vibrations for a refined sound profile and smooth feel

script.title: Unlock Your Gaming Potential!
script.narration: Does your keyboard hold you back in epic battles? The ASUS ROG Azoth Extreme is here to change that! With ultra-responsive 8K polling and a sleek aluminum build, every game feels like a dream. Elevate your setup today! Link is in the first comment!

bullets: 【Gasket Mount Gaming Keyboard with Number Pad】: Computer keyboard adopts 98 keys layout design, retaining numpad, arrow keys and most functions, saving your desktop space and making it more suitable for gaming and work. Five layers sound-absorbing foam to ensure thocky feeling and creamy sounding for you

【MDA Profile & Premium PBT Keycaps】: MDA profile is a popular choice among mechanical keyboard enthusiasts because it fits fingers better, provides a stronger sense of wrapping when typing. PBT keycaps are made of double shot, with a matte surface, non-fading, durability and longer service life
